name: libkrb5-dev
title: libkrb5-dev
summary: headers and development libraries for MIT Kerberos
description:
headers and development libraries for MIT Kerberos
Kerberos is a system for authenticating users and services on a network.
Kerberos is a trusted third-party service.  That means that there is a
third party (the Kerberos server) that is trusted by all the entities on
the network (users and services, usually called "principals").
.
This is the MIT reference implementation of Kerberos V5.
.
This package contains the symlinks, headers, and development libraries
needed to compile and link programs that use the Kerberos libraries.

commands.name: krb5-config
commands.description: tool for linking against MIT Kerberos libraries
